item.title: Sources: US Envoy Barrack Meets Iraq's Ex-Prime Minister Maliki
item.description: U.S. envoy Tom Barrack met former Iraqi Prime Minister Nouri al-Maliki, the Shiite alliance's candidate for premier, on Friday, two sources familiar w...

item.title: Fed in Closed-Door Clash With DOJ Over Powell Probe
item.description: The Federal Reserve is mounting a behind-closed-doors legal fight against Justice Department subpoenas tied to U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's criminal ...

item.title: Bill Clinton Faces Grilling From Lawmakers Over His Connections to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton is testifying Friday before members of Congress investigating convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, answering for his ...

item.title: JD Vance: No Endless War as Trump Weighs Iran Strikes
item.description: Vice President JD Vance reportedly said there's "no chance" military strikes on Iran would result in the U.S. becoming involved in a prolonged war.
